nodes.agentAgentflow: Dynamically choose and utilize tools during runtime, enabling multi-step reasoning
nodes.conditionAgentflow: Split flows based on If Else conditions
nodes.conditionAgentAgentflow: Utilize an agent to split flows based on dynamic conditions
nodes.directReplyAgentflow: Directly reply to the user with a message
nodes.humanInputAgentflow: Request human input, approval or rejection during execution
nodes.iterationAgentflow: Execute the nodes within the iteration block through N iterations
nodes.llmAgentflow: Large language models to analyze user-provided inputs and generate responses
nodes.loopAgentflow: Loop back to a previous node
nodes.stickyNoteAgentflow: Add notes to the agent flow
nodes.toolAgentflow: Tools allow LLM to interact with external systems
nodes.airtableAgent: Agent used to answer queries on Airtable table
nodes.conversationalAgent: Conversational agent for a chat model. It will utilize chat specific prompts
nodes.conversationalRetrievalToolAgent: Agent that calls a vector store retrieval and uses Function Calling to pick the tools and args to call
nodes.csvAgent: Agent used to answer queries on CSV data
nodes.anthropicAgentLlamaIndex: Agent that uses Anthropic Claude Function Calling to pick the tools and args to call using LlamaIndex
nodes.openAIToolAgentLlamaIndex: Agent that uses OpenAI Function Calling to pick the tools and args to call using LlamaIndex
nodes.openAIAssistant: An agent that uses OpenAI Assistant API to pick the tool and args to call
nodes.reactAgentChat: Agent that uses the ReAct logic to decide what action to take, optimized to be used with Chat Models
nodes.reactAgentLLM: Agent that uses the ReAct logic to decide what action to take, optimized to be used with LLMs
nodes.toolAgent: Agent that uses Function Calling to pick the tools and args to call
nodes.xmlAgent: Agent that is designed for LLMs that are good for reasoning/writing XML (e.g: Anthropic Claude)
nodes.inMemoryCache: Cache LLM response in memory, will be cleared once app restarted
nodes.inMemoryEmbeddingCache: Cache generated Embeddings in memory to avoid needing to recompute them.
nodes.momentoCache: Cache LLM response using Momento, a distributed, serverless cache
nodes.redisCache: Cache LLM response in Redis, useful for sharing cache across multiple processes or servers
nodes.redisEmbeddingsCache: Cache generated Embeddings in Redis to avoid needing to recompute them.
nodes.upstashRedisCache: Cache LLM response in Upstash Redis, serverless data for Redis and Kafka
nodes.getApiChain: Chain to run queries against GET API
nodes.openApiChain: Chain that automatically select and call APIs based only on an OpenAPI spec
nodes.postApiChain: Chain to run queries against POST API
nodes.conversationalRetrievalQAChain: Document QA - built on RetrievalQAChain to provide a chat history component
nodes.conversationChain: Chat models specific conversational chain with memory
nodes.graphCypherQAChain: Advanced chain for question-answering against a Neo4j graph by generating Cypher statements
nodes.llmChain: Chain to run queries against LLMs
nodes.multiPromptChain: Chain automatically picks an appropriate prompt from multiple prompt templates
nodes.multiRetrievalQAChain: QA Chain that automatically picks an appropriate vector store from multiple retrievers
nodes.retrievalQAChain: QA chain to answer a question based on the retrieved documents
nodes.sqlDatabaseChain: Answer questions over a SQL database

nodes.simpleChatEngine: Simple engine to handle back and forth conversations

nodes.subQuestionQueryEngine: Breaks complex query into sub questions for each relevant data source, then gather all the intermediate responses and synthesizes a final response

nodes.azureOpenAI: Wrapper around Azure OpenAI large language models
nodes.cohere: Wrapper around Cohere large language models
nodes.fireworks: Wrapper around Fireworks API for large language models

nodes.huggingFaceInference_LLMs: Wrapper around HuggingFace large language models
nodes.ibmWatsonx: Wrapper around IBM watsonx.ai foundation models
nodes.ollama: Wrapper around open source large language models on Ollama
nodes.openAI: Wrapper around OpenAI large language models
nodes.replicate: Use Replicate to run open source models on cloud

nodes.togetherAI: Wrapper around TogetherAI large language models
nodes.agentMemory: Memory for agentflow to remember the state of the conversation
nodes.mySQLAgentMemory: Memory for agentflow to remember the state of the conversation using MySQL database
nodes.postgresAgentMemory: Memory for agentflow to remember the state of the conversation using Postgres database
nodes.sqliteAgentMemory: Memory for agentflow to remember the state of the conversation using SQLite database
nodes.bufferMemory: Retrieve chat messages stored in database
nodes.bufferWindowMemory: Uses a window of size k to surface the last k back-and-forth to use as memory
nodes.conversationSummaryBufferMemory: Uses token length to decide when to summarize conversations
nodes.conversationSummaryMemory: Summarizes the conversation and stores the current summary in memory
nodes.DynamoDBChatMemory: Stores the conversation in dynamo db table
nodes.mem0: Stores and manages chat memory using Mem0 service
nodes.MongoDBAtlasChatMemory: Stores the conversation in MongoDB Atlas
nodes.RedisBackedChatMemory: Summarizes the conversation and stores the memory in Redis server
nodes.upstashRedisBackedChatMemory: Summarizes the conversation and stores the memory in Upstash Redis server
nodes.ZepMemory: Summarizes the conversation and stores the memory in zep server
nodes.ZepMemoryCloud: Summarizes the conversation and stores the memory in zep server
nodes.inputModerationOpenAI: Check whether content complies with OpenAI usage policies.
nodes.inputModerationSimple: Check whether input consists of any text from Deny list, and prevent being sent to LLM
nodes.csvOutputParser: Parse the output of an LLM call as a comma-separated list of values
nodes.customListOutputParser: Parse the output of an LLM call as a list of values.
nodes.structuredOutputParser: Parse the output of an LLM call into a given (JSON) structure.
nodes.advancedStructuredOutputParser: Parse the output of an LLM call into a given structure by providing a Zod schema.
nodes.chatPromptTemplate: Schema to represent a chat prompt
nodes.fewShotPromptTemplate: Prompt template you can build with examples
nodes.promptLangFuse: Fetch schema from LangFuse to represent a prompt for an LLM
nodes.promptTemplate: Schema to represent a basic prompt for an LLM
nodes.MySQLRecordManager: Use MySQL to keep track of document writes into the vector databases
nodes.postgresRecordManager: Use Postgres to keep track of document writes into the vector databases
nodes.SQLiteRecordManager: Use SQLite to keep track of document writes into the vector databases
nodes.compactrefineLlamaIndex: CompactRefine is a slight variation of Refine that first compacts the text chunks into the smallest possible number of chunks.
nodes.refineLlamaIndex: Create and refine an answer by sequentially going through each retrieved text chunk. This makes a separate LLM call per Node. Good for more detailed answers.
nodes.simpleResponseBuilderLlamaIndex: Apply a query to a collection of text chunks, gathering the responses in an array, and return a combined string of all responses. Useful for individual queries on each text chunk.
nodes.treeSummarizeLlamaIndex: Given a set of text chunks and the query, recursively construct a tree and return the root node as the response. Good for summarization purposes.
nodes.awsBedrockKBRetriever: Connect to AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base API and retrieve relevant chunks
nodes.AzureRerankRetriever: Azure Rerank indexes the documents from most to least semantically relevant to the query.
nodes.cohereRerankRetriever: Cohere Rerank indexes the documents from most to least semantically relevant to the query.
nodes.customRetriever: Return results based on predefined format
nodes.embeddingsFilterRetriever: A document compressor that uses embeddings to drop documents unrelated to the query
nodes.extractMetadataRetriever: Extract keywords/metadata from the query and use it to filter documents
nodes.HydeRetriever: Use HyDE retriever to retrieve from a vector store
nodes.JinaRerankRetriever: Jina AI Rerank indexes the documents from most to least semantically relevant to the query.
nodes.llmFilterRetriever: Iterate over the initially returned documents and extract, from each, only the content that is relevant to the query
nodes.multiQueryRetriever: Generate multiple queries from different perspectives for a given user input query
nodes.promptRetriever: Store prompt template with name & description to be later queried by MultiPromptChain
nodes.RRFRetriever: Reciprocal Rank Fusion to re-rank search results by multiple query generation.
nodes.similarityThresholdRetriever: Return results based on the minimum similarity percentage
nodes.vectorStoreRetriever: Store vector store as retriever to be later queried by MultiRetrievalQAChain
nodes.voyageAIRerankRetriever: Voyage AI Rerank indexes the documents from most to least semantically relevant to the query.
nodes.seqCondition: Conditional function to determine which route to take next
nodes.seqConditionAgent: Uses an agent to determine which route to take next
nodes.seqExecuteFlow: Execute chatflow/agentflow and return final response
nodes.seqLLMNode: Run Chat Model and return the output
nodes.seqLoop: Loop back to the specific sequential node
nodes.seqState: A centralized state object, updated by nodes in the graph, passing from one node to another
nodes.seqToolNode: Execute tool and return tool's output
nodes.characterTextSplitter: Splits only on one type of character (defaults to "\n\n")
nodes.codeTextSplitter: Split documents based on language-specific syntax
nodes.htmlToMarkdownTextSplitter: Converts Html to Markdown and then split your content into documents based on the Markdown headers
nodes.markdownTextSplitter: Split your content into documents based on the Markdown headers
nodes.recursiveCharacterTextSplitter:
Split documents recursively by different characters - starting with "

", then "
", then " "
nodes.tokenTextSplitter: Splits a raw text string by first converting the text into BPE tokens, then split these tokens into chunks and convert the tokens within a single chunk back into text.
nodes.agentAsTool: Use as a tool to execute another agentflow
nodes.arxiv: Search and read content from academic papers on Arxiv
nodes.awsDynamoDBKVStorage: Store and retrieve versioned text values in AWS DynamoDB
nodes.awsSNS: Publish messages to AWS SNS topics
nodes.braveSearchAPI: Wrapper around BraveSearch API - a real-time API to access Brave search results
nodes.chainTool: Use a chain as allowed tool for agent
nodes.ChatflowTool: Use as a tool to execute another chatflow
nodes.codeInterpreterE2B: Execute code in a sandbox environment
nodes.composio: Toolset with over 250+ Apps for building AI-powered applications
nodes.currentDateTime: Get todays day, date and time.
nodes.customTool: Use custom tool you've created in Flowise within chatflow
nodes.exaSearch: Wrapper around Exa Search API - search engine fully designed for use by LLMs
nodes.gmail: Perform Gmail operations for drafts, messages, labels, and threads
nodes.googleCalendarTool: Perform Google Calendar operations such as managing events, calendars, and checking availability
nodes.googleDocsTool: Perform Google Docs operations such as creating, reading, updating, and deleting documents, as well as text manipulation
nodes.googleDriveTool: Perform Google Drive operations such as managing files, folders, sharing, and searching
nodes.googleCustomSearch: Wrapper around Google Custom Search API - a real-time API to access Google search results
nodes.googleSheetsTool: Perform Google Sheets operations such as managing spreadsheets, reading and writing values
nodes.jiraTool: Perform Jira operations for issues, comments, and users
nodes.jsonPathExtractor: Extract values from JSON using path expressions
nodes.braveSearchMCP: MCP server that integrates the Brave Search API - a real-time API to access web search capabilities
nodes.browserlessMCP: MCP Server for Browserless - scrape pages, take screenshots, generate PDFs, and more
nodes.githubMCP: MCP Server for the GitHub API
nodes.pipedreamMCP: MCP Server for Pipedream. For critical actions, ensure "Require Human Input" is enabled on the Agent node.
nodes.postgreSQLMCP: MCP server that provides read-only access to PostgreSQL databases
nodes.sequentialThinkingMCP: MCP server that provides a tool for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through a structured thinking process
nodes.slackMCP: MCP Server for the Slack API
nodes.supergatewayMCP: Runs MCP stdio-based servers over SSE (Server-Sent Events) or WebSockets (WS)
nodes.teradataMCP: MCP Server for Teradata (remote HTTP streamable)
nodes.microsoftOutlook: Perform Microsoft Outlook operations for calendars, events, and messages
nodes.microsoftTeams: Perform Microsoft Teams operations for channels, chats, and chat messages
nodes.openAPIToolkit: Load OpenAPI specification, and converts each API endpoint to a tool
nodes.queryEngineToolLlamaIndex: Tool used to invoke query engine
nodes.retrieverTool: Use a retriever as allowed tool for agent
nodes.searchAPI: Real-time API for accessing Google Search data
nodes.searXNG: Wrapper around SearXNG - a free internet metasearch engine
nodes.serpAPI: Wrapper around SerpAPI - a real-time API to access Google search results
nodes.serper: Wrapper around Serper.dev - Google Search API
nodes.stripeAgentTool: Use Stripe Agent function calling for financial transactions
nodes.tavilyAPI: Wrapper around TavilyAPI - A specialized search engine designed for LLMs and AI agents
nodes.webBrowser: Gives agent the ability to visit a website and extract information
nodes.webScraperTool: Scrapes web pages recursively by following links OR by fetching URLs from the default sitemap.
nodes.wolframAlpha: Wrapper around WolframAlpha - a powerful computational knowledge engine
nodes.getVariable: Get variable that was saved using Set Variable node
nodes.ifElseFunction: Split flows based on If Else javascript functions
nodes.setVariable: Set variable which can be retrieved at a later stage. Variable is only available during runtime.
nodes.Astra: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search upon query using DataStax Astra DB, a serverless vector database that's perfect for managing mission-critical AI workloads
nodes.chroma: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Chroma, an open-source embedding database
nodes.couchbase: Upsert embedded data and load existing index using Couchbase, a award-winning distributed NoSQL database
nodes.documentStoreVS: Search and retrieve documents from Document Store
nodes.elasticsearch: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Elasticsearch, a distributed search and analytics engine
nodes.faiss: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Faiss library from Meta
nodes.memoryVectorStore: In-memory vectorstore that stores embeddings and does an exact, linear search for the most similar embeddings.
nodes.kendra: Use AWS Kendra's intelligent search service for document retrieval and semantic search
nodes.meilisearch: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Meilisearch hybrid search functionality
nodes.milvus: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Milvus, world's most advanced open-source vector database
nodes.mongoDBAtlas: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search upon query using MongoDB Atlas, a managed cloud mongodb database
nodes.openSearch: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using OpenSearch, an open-source, all-in-one vector database
nodes.pinecone: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search using Pinecone, a leading fully managed hosted vector database
nodes.pineconeLlamaIndex: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Pinecone, a leading fully managed hosted vector database
nodes.postgres: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using pgvector on Postgres
nodes.qdrant: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Qdrant, a scalable open source vector database written in Rust
nodes.redis: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Redis, an open source, in-memory data structure store
nodes.simpleStoreLlamaIndex: Upsert embedded data to local path and perform similarity search
nodes.singlestore: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using SingleStore, a fast and distributed cloud relational database
nodes.supabase: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search upon query using Supabase via pgvector extension
nodes.upstash: Upsert data as embedding or string and perform similarity search with Upstash, the leading serverless data platform
nodes.vectara: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity search upon query using Vectara, a LLM-powered search-as-a-service
nodes.weaviate: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search using Weaviate, a scalable open-source vector database
nodes.zep: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search upon query using Zep, a fast and scalable building block for LLM apps
nodes.zepCloud: Upsert embedded data and perform similarity or mmr search upon query using Zep, a fast and scalable building block for LLM apps
